hooks.command:
# Ensure git identity is set
git config user.name 'Yipeng Li' 2>/dev/null; git config user.email 'y9li@ucsd.edu' 2>/dev/null
# Strip Co-Authored-By from the command if present
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qi 'co-authored-by'; then
  echo 'BLOCK: Do not include Co-Authored-By lines in commit messages' >&2
  exit 2
fi
